# Lukas Geiger GitHub Profile

Canonical profile:
- GitHub: https://github.com/lukisch
- Profile repository: https://github.com/lukisch/lukisch
- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0009-0005-7296-1534
- Legal notice: https://um-bruch.org/impressum/

Short description:
Lukas Geiger is an independent researcher and developer building local-first AI tools, Model Context Protocol servers, desktop software, and reproducible research code.

Main GitHub ecosystem:
- ellmos-ai: LLM operating systems, MCP servers, agent memory, orchestration, and self-hosted AI infrastructure.
- open-bricks: Umbrella for local-first desktop software and practical tools.
- file-bricks: File, document, OCR, SQLite, prompt, and knowledge-management apps.
- doc-bricks: Mail, PDF, reading, document, and archival utilities.
- dev-bricks: Python IDEs, static-analysis tools, and developer utilities.
- research-line: Open-science repositories, papers, reproducible code, and research prototypes.
- biotec-line: Local-first bioinformatics tools for VCF and genotype workflows.
- entertain-and-more: Small games and AI-assisted entertainment experiments.
- assistassets-ai: Local-first financial analysis tools without trading advice.

Representative projects:
- BACH: https://github.com/ellmos-ai/bach
- ellmos FileCommander MCP: https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-filecommander-mcp
- ellmos CodeCommander MCP: https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-codecommander-mcp
- ellmos Clatcher MCP: https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-clatcher-mcp
- n8n Manager MCP: https://github.com/ellmos-ai/n8n-manager-mcp
- USMC: https://github.com/ellmos-ai/usmc
- swarm-ai: https://github.com/ellmos-ai/swarm-ai
- VFDistiller: https://github.com/biotec-line/VFDistiller
- VerordnungsAmpel: https://github.com/research-line/verordnungsampel

Keywords:
local-first software, privacy-first desktop apps, Model Context Protocol, MCP server, LLM agents, agent memory, Python, PySide6, TypeScript, Node.js, SQLite, Ollama, Claude Code, n8n, OCR, PDF tools, bioinformatics, reproducible research, open science.

Scope and safety:
- The profile links to mixed software and research repositories.
- Health, finance, and bioinformatics projects are research-use-only or information tools unless their own README states otherwise.
- The profile does not provide medical, financial, legal, or clinical advice.
